body.title: Trace why cortex.search() misses 99.97% of FACTUALs
body.result: 5-fix chain: (1) factual_question intent (thalamus), (2) semantic_anchor traversal (thalamus), (3) per-term ILIKE FACTUAL supplement with stop-word filter (cortex), (4) Phase 2 force-inject for FACTUAL supplement nodes (cortex), (5) parsed.core_input in _tier0_response to strip routing directives (main.py). Probe confirmed: Hebbian learning → FACTUAL 'fire together wire together'. G-FACTUAL-RETRIEVAL1 closed.
body.description: 10711/10714 FACTUAL nodes never retrieved. Investigate: FACTUALs excluded from search scope? Embeddings missing? Threshold too high? S-size — trace cortex.search() call path, check embedding coverage on FACTUAL nodes, test with a known book node ID.
